title: integration: re-enable image-tools upstream validation
body:
This effectively reverts f4a44f0 ("integration: disable check with
image-tools for image-spec RC5"), which disabled the compliance
validation due to upstream bugs. Since those bugs have been fixed,
re-enable the tests (to make the smoke tests far more effective).

Fixes: f4a44f0 ("integration: disable check with image-tools for image-spec RC5")
Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <asarai@suse.de>
